svg.title: CI/CD Pipeline Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: A CI/CD pipeline showing stages from GitHub source code through Jenkins, SonarQube, OWASP ZAP, Trivy, Docker Hub, container registry, Docker, Gmail notification, developer, Kubernetes, ArgoCD, and Grafana/Prometheus.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What role does GitHub play in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does Jenkins do in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does SonarQube check in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does OWASP ZAP do in a security pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does Trivy scan for in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is Docker Hub used for in CI/CD?')
sendPrompt('What is a private container registry used for?')
sendPrompt('How does Docker fit into a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How are email notifications configured in Jenkins?')
sendPrompt('What does a developer do after receiving a pipeline notification?')
sendPrompt('How does Kubernetes orchestrate containers in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is ArgoCD and how does it implement GitOps?')
sendPrompt('How do Grafana and Prometheus monitor a Kubernetes cluster?')
